## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issues/tasks:
*   Which features or bug fixes does this PR implement?
*   What major design decisions were made?

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Code cleanup / Refactoring (structural improvements without behavioral changes)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Verification Details

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes:
*   How did you test your changes?
*   List command lines of tests run (e.g. `pytest` or `npm run build`).

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the PEP 8 / TypeScript coding standards of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] My changes generate no new compilation warnings or pytest failures.
